tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: The bald eagle is the national bird of this country
Stonehenge is located on Salisbury Plain in this country
The Great Barrier Reef lies off the coast of this country
The Stars and Stripes is the name of this country's flag
Big Ben is a famous clock tower in this country's capital
Uluru is a sacred sandstone rock formation in this country
The Grand Canyon is one of this country's natural wonders
The Union Jack is the national flag of this country
The kangaroo and emu appear on this country's coat of arms
The Eiffel Tower is the most visited landmark in this country
The Taj Mahal is a famous marble mausoleum in this country
Niagara Falls is shared between this country and the USA
